steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
Let $x$ be the number of 4-pound boxes. The total weight is the sum of weights from both types of boxes:
$$4x + 9(15) = 219$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Simplify and isolate $x$:
$$4x + 135 = 219$$
$$4x = 84$$
$$x = 21$$
That is the correct answer.
